scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/render-issue-md.js && node --check src/setup-tui.mjs && node bin/jtt.js help >/dev/null && node bin/jtt.js setup --help >/dev/null && node bin/jtt.js integrate --help >/dev/null && node bin/jtt.js export --help >/dev/null && node bin/jtt.js doctor --help >/dev/null && node bin/jtt.js uninstall --help >/dev/null
scripts.lint:shell: bash -lc 'if ! command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "shellcheck not installed; skipping shell lint"; exit 0; fi; shellcheck cursor/skills/jira-plan/scripts/ensure-export.sh cursor/skills/jira-review/scripts/require-export.sh'
scripts.smoke: bash -lc 'tmp_home=$(mktemp -d) && HOME="$tmp_home" node bin/jtt.js integrate all --quiet && HOME="$tmp_home" node bin/jtt.js uninstall all --dry-run --quiet'
